con:part.con:content: <!--Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.2.10 svn-revision#919b322c92f13ad085a933e8dd6dd35d4947364b.--> <wsdl:definitions name="IntimationWS" targetNamespace="http://www.icicibank.com/ws/intimation" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://www.icicibank.com/ws/intimation" xmlns:api="http://www.icicibank.com/api/acme" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.icicibank.com/api/acme"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://localhost:8080/ixc-ecollection-profunds-api-v3.6-java-soap-webservice-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT/ws/eCollection/ACME?xsd=1"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IntimationRequest"> <wsdl:part element="api:intimation_request" name="IntimationRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IntimationResponse"> <wsdl:part element="api:intimation_response" name="IntimationResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IntimationPort"> <wsdl:operation name="Intimate"> <wsdl:input message="tns:IntimationRequest"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:IntimationResponse"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="IntimationSOAP11HTTPBinding" type="tns:IntimationPort"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="Intimate"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://www.icicibank.com/api/acme/intimation"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="IntimationSOAP11WS"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:IntimationSOAP11HTTPBinding" name="IntimationSOAP11WSPort"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/ixc-ecollection-profunds-api-v3.6-java-soap-webservice-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT/ws/eCollection/ACME"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<!--Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.2.10 svn-revision#919b322c92f13ad085a933e8dd6dd35d4947364b.--> <xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:simpleType name="request_priority_type"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3"/> <xsd:enumeration value="4"/> <xsd:enumeration value="5"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:element name="api_version" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="request_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="request_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="request_priority" type="request_priority_type"/> <xsd:element name="parent_request_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="parent_request_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="sender_system_user_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_system_user_id_type" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="resent_indicator" type="xsd:boolean"/> <xsd:element name="original_request_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="original_request_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="original_channel_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="original_sender_system_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="original_request_priority" type="request_priority_type"/> <xsd:element name="original_sender_system_user_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="original_sender_system_user_id_type" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_system_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="channel_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="test_indicator" type="xsd:boolean"/> <xsd:element name="client_code" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="virtual_account_number" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="transaction_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:simpleType name="transaction_id_type_type"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="UTR"/> <xsd:enumeration value="RRN"/> <xsd:enumeration value="TRANID"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:element name="transaction_id_type" type="transaction_id_type_type"/> <xsd:element name="transaction_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="transaction_amount" type="xsd:decimal"/> <xsd:element name="currency_code" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:simpleType name="payment_mode_type"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="NEFT"/> <xsd:enumeration value="RTGS"/> <xsd:enumeration value="IMPS"/> <xsd:enumeration value="FT"/> <xsd:enumeration value="UTR"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:element name="payment_mode" type="payment_mode_type"/> <xsd:element name="sender_name" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_mobile_communication_number" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_account_number" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_bank_name" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="sender_ifsc_code" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_account_name" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_mobile_communication_number" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_account_number" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_bank_name" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_ifsc_code" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="narration_1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="narration_2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="informational_message" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="external_system_reference_1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="external_system_reference_2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="client_remarks" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:complexType name="client_data_ext_type"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:any minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:element name="client_data_ext" type="client_data_ext_type"/> <xsd:element name="response_id" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="response_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:simpleType name="completion_code_type"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"> <xsd:enumeration value="0"/> <!--Successful--> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <!--Warning--> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <!--Error--> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:element name="completion_code" type="completion_code_type"/> <xsd:element name="reason_code" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="message" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="retry_indicator" type="xsd:boolean"/> <xsd:element name="retry_after_interval" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="retry_after_datetime" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="intimation_request" type="intimation_requestType"/> <xsd:element name="intimation_response" type="intimation_responseType"/> <xsd:complexType name="intimation_requestType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="api_version"/> <xsd:element ref="request_id"/> <xsd:element ref="request_datetime"/> <xsd:element ref="parent_request_id" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="parent_request_datetime" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="channel_id" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_system_id" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="transaction_datetime"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_name"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_mobile_communication_number" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_account_number"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_bank_name" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="sender_ifsc_code"/> <xsd:element ref="client_account_name" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="client_mobile_communication_number" ref="external_system_reference_2" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="client_remarks" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element ref="client_data_ext" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType>
